---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest an idea to improve the framework
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: enhancement
---

## What Problem Are You Trying to Solve?
Describe the situation or pain point. What are you trying to achieve?

## Proposed Solution
How would you like this framework to help? Describe the ideal user experience.

## Alternative Approaches
Have you considered other solutions?

## Additional Context
Any other relevant information? Links, examples, or context?

---

**Tip:** Focus on what you want to achieve, not how to build it. That's the AI's job!
